rules: Flag stocks with 20%+ price swings in 6 months that are in a clear uptrend — price above 20-week moving average
Prioritize stocks that have pulled back to Fibonacci support levels (0.5-0.618) from their most recent swing high — these offer the best risk/reward entries
Flag unusual options or stock volume spikes (1.5x+ above 30-day average) — but do NOT disqualify stocks with low volume if they meet catalyst or backlog criteria below
Include stocks with upcoming catalysts within 60 days: earnings, product launches, government contracts, analyst days, industry conferences
Target themes: AI, semiconductors, defense, space, robotics, voice AI, crypto, EV, energy infrastructure, biotech, advanced manufacturing
Flag any stock with 100%+ move in 6 months that announces a strategic partnership or contract with a Fortune 500 or mega-cap company — institutional accumulation precedes retail volume on these names

Flag component and supplier stocks with 40%+ moves that serve emerging technology categories (physical AI, robotics, autonomous vehicles, advanced packaging, grid modernization) even with thin volume — adoption ramps precede volume
Flag any sector stock with 40%+ move that has book-to-bill ratio above 1.1 AND 15%+ YoY revenue growth — backlog visibility predicts price moves regardless of current volume

Flag infrastructure plays in any sector (energy, grid, power, connectivity, optical, test equipment) with 40%+ moves that announce AI data center, defense, or hyperscaler contracts — AI capex creates broad infrastructure demand across unexpected sectors

Flag stocks with strategic M&A activity (acquisitions, JVs, spin-offs) that expand TAM into high-growth sectors, with 20%+ price move — deal activity signals institutional interest before retail volume arrives
Flag any stock with 150%+ move in 6 months showing sequential quarterly revenue growth of 10%+ — magnitude of move plus fundamental improvement overrides volume requirement entirely

Flag stocks showing gross margin expansion for 3+ consecutive quarters with 40%+ price move — margin inflection validates the business model and signals institutional accumulation regardless of sector or volume

Flag recent IPOs (within 12 months) with 50%+ post-IPO moves AND backlog exceeding 150% of trailing 12-month revenue — new listings with strong order books are early institutional plays before retail discovers them

Flag automotive, industrial, and manufacturing stocks pivoting toward software, AI, or robotics with 15%+ moves — hardware-to-software transitions are underpriced by traditional screens that focus on pure-play tech
Flag EDA, simulation, test, and semiconductor infrastructure software stocks with 20%+ moves near earnings or M&A events — design tool demand leads chip production cycles by 12-18 months
learnedPatterns: [v2] After adding VLN: Flag semiconductor stocks with >150% move in 6 months and recent automotive/ADAS design wins even if volume is low (growth-stage chips trade thin until production ramps)

[v3] After adding BB: Flag stocks with 100%+ moves in 6 months that announce partnerships with mega-cap AI leaders (NVIDIA, MSFT, GOOGL) even if volume is below average—enterprise software plays trade on headlines not retail volume until institutional accumulation completes

[v4] After adding VPG: Flag stocks with 200%+ moves in 6 months that secure orders from emerging Physical AI/humanoid robotics developers (even prototype-stage) if bookings show 20%+ sequential growth and book-to-bill exceeds 1.15—these component plays trade on order momentum before volume arrives

[v5] After adding CTS: Flag industrial component stocks with 40%+ moves in 6 months that report 15%+ YoY growth in industrial/medical automation segments AND book-to-bill ratios above 1.1 even if volume is below average—automation sensor plays trade on OEM design-in cycles and long-lead backlog visibility before retail volume materializes.

[v6] After adding BLDP: Flag hydrogen fuel-cell stocks with 150%+ moves in 6 months that secure multi-year OEM supply agreements (2+ years) with established transit/commercial vehicle manufacturers AND report 3+ consecutive quarters of positive gross margins even if volume is below average—fuel-cell adoption plays trade on margin inflection and contracted demand visibility before retail volume arrives

[v7] After adding SHLS: Flag solar/battery infrastructure stocks with 40%+ moves in 6 months that report record backlogs exceeding 150% of trailing 12-month revenue AND raise full-year revenue guidance by 7%+ mid-year AND announce partnerships with AI data center developers even if volume is below average—electrical system plays for utility-scale solar and AI power infrastructure trade on awarded order books and capacity expansion before volume materializes

[v8] After adding FPS: Flag electrical infrastructure stocks that IPO'd within 6 months with 75%+ moves post-IPO that report backlogs exceeding 200% of trailing 12-month revenue AND book-to-bill ratios above 2.0x AND secure data center contracts with hyperscalers or cloud providers even if volume is below average—AI power infrastructure plays trade on awarded mega-backlog visibility and data center capacity bottlenecks before retail volume arrives

[v9] After adding AMRC: Flag energy efficiency and renewable infrastructure stocks with 20%+ moves in 6 months that announce strategic JV transactions valued at $1B+ with institutional capital partners AND report contracted backlogs exceeding 2x trailing 12-month revenue AND secure 15%+ YoY growth in awarded contracts even if volume is below average—energy-as-a-service plays trade on multi-year project pipelines and balance sheet de-risking before retail volume materializes

[v10] After adding AMSC: Flag grid modernization and naval defense infrastructure stocks with 100%+ moves in 6 months that complete strategic acquisitions exceeding $150M AND report 12-month backlogs exceeding $200M AND secure military degaussing or data-center power stabilization contracts AND report 3+ consecutive quarters of 30%+ gross margins even if volume is below average—AI power infrastructure and naval electrification plays trade on acquisition-driven TAM expansion and defense/utility contract visibility before retail volume materializes.

[v11] After adding PLPC: Flag electrical grid infrastructure component stocks with 80%+ moves in 6 months that report 15%+ YoY revenue growth AND secure strategic partnerships with robotics/automation providers for utility deployment AND complete acquisitions expanding substation/connector capabilities even if volume is below 0.3x average—grid modernization plays trade on awarded utility contracts and technology partnerships before retail volume arrives

[v12] After adding VIAV: Flag optical test and measurement infrastructure stocks with 200%+ moves in 6 months that report 40%+ YoY revenue growth driven by data center or aerospace/defense end markets AND report sequential quarterly revenue growth of 10%+ with operating margin expansion of 400+ bps YoY AND secure analyst price target upgrades above $60 even if volume is below 0.15x average—AI infrastructure validation plays trade on data center capex cycles and margin inflection before retail volume materializes

[v13] After adding AMKR: Flag outsourced semiconductor packaging (OSAT) stocks with 100%+ moves in 6 months that report advanced AI packaging revenue growth exceeding 200% YoY AND secure multi-customer advanced packaging program wins (5+ customers) for data center CPUs or AI accelerators AND report record quarterly revenue with 25%+ YoY growth even if volume is below 0.25x average—AI packaging bottleneck plays trade on capacity constraint visibility and multi-program qualification momentum before retail volume materializes

[v14] After adding APTV: Flag automotive technology stocks with 15%+ moves in 6 months that announce strategic robotics/industrial automation partnerships with global manufacturing leaders (Comau-tier) AND report multi-quarter sequential growth in software/ADAS segments AND complete portfolio restructuring via spin-offs that reduce debt by $1.5B+ AND secure OEM radar/sensor design wins with Tier-1 automakers (Volvo-class) even if volume is below 0.3x average—automotive-to-robotics pivot plays trade on intelligent edge computing TAM expansion and balance sheet optimization before retail volume materializes

[v15] After adding SNPS: Flag EDA/semiconductor design software stocks with 20%+ moves in 6 months that complete $30B+ strategic acquisitions expanding into multi-physics simulation AND report activist investor stakes exceeding $2B AND secure foundry partnerships (TSMC-tier) on sub-3nm nodes AND announce Q2 earnings within 5 days even if volume is below 0.25x average—silicon-to-systems infrastructure plays trade on M&A integration momentum, activist efficiency catalysts, and advanced-node design tool demand visibility before retail volume materializes
